title: GoalOS Signoff Pro v30-v34 Premium Experience Map
tagline: Blockchain proves the transaction. GoalOS proves the work. RSI governs invention. ASI must not self-authorize.

chapters.purpose: Make proof before settlement a formal blockchain credibility standard.
chapters.bestNextAction: Read the tear sheet and inspect the due-diligence rubric.

chapters.purpose: Give first-time visitors an immediate role-based proof console.
chapters.visitorQuestion: What does GoalOS do for me?
chapters.bestNextAction: Choose a role and run the gates.

chapters.purpose: Translate proof loops into deterministic invention governance.
chapters.visitorQuestion: How does GoalOS govern open-ended discovery?
chapters.bestNextAction: Inspect the deterministic pipeline and OMNI boundary.

chapters.purpose: Escalate RSI governance into ASI-readiness boundaries.
chapters.bestNextAction: Run the ASI-readiness scenario and inspect gates.

chapters.purpose: Provide a complete control tower with stress testing, rollback, council, dossier, and receipt.
chapters.visitorQuestion: What should leadership see before authorization?
chapters.bestNextAction: Run the full control tower and copy the board memo.

sourceGrounding: AGI Alpha RSI presentation: governance institution first; deterministic discovery to auditable advantage; OMNI search control not outcome authority; breakthroughs are audited state transitions.
AGI Alpha RSI strategy brief: deterministic pipeline; baseline discipline; ECI semantics; Move-37 handling; operational dashboard; dossier options.
